marketplace.name: Dynamicweb Skills
marketplace.description: Claude skills for Dynamicweb 10 — organized by task domain, bundled by role.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-developer
plugins.description: Skills for developers building on the Dynamicweb 10 platform — MCP tools, source exploration, and solution bootstrapping.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-implementer
plugins.description: Skills for implementers configuring PIM, content, and full business solutions on Dynamicweb 10.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-user

plugins.name: dynamicweb-presales
plugins.description: Skills for presales and demo engineers running Dynamicweb 10 demos — PIM, Swift frontend, ERP integration, and BC connector.
